channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Elasticsearch Learning to Rank
item.description: Elasticsearch Learning to Rank In-engine LTR: running a learned ranking model inside Elasticsearch as a second-stage rescorer, rather than in an external service.

item.title: Learning to Rank
item.description: Learning to Rank Definition Learning to Rank (LTR) is the application of machine learning to the ranking problem in information retrieval — training models to produce optimal rankings given a query and a set of candidate documents, using labeled (query, document, relevance) training data.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: Metarank
item.description: Metarank Open-source, real-time secondary re-ranker and personalization service written in Scala.

item.title: RankLib
item.description: RankLib Stub. Created as a placeholder — expand with vault-sourced content.

item.title: eland
item.description: eland Elastic’s Python client for loading and managing machine-learning models in Elasticsearch.

item.title: Learning To Rank (LTR) - Elasticsearch Native
item.description: Learning To Rank (LTR) - Elasticsearch Native Source: www.elastic.co/docs/solutions/search/ranking/learning-to-rank-ltr Author: Elastic (official docs) Overview page for Elasticsearch’s native LTR, introduced in version 8.12.0 (subscription-gated).

item.title: Search using LTR - Elastic Docs
item.description: Search using LTR - Elastic Docs Source: www.elastic.co/docs/solutions/search/ranking/learning-to-rank-search-usage Author: Elastic (official docs) How to apply a deployed native Elasticsearch LTR model at search time (8.12.0+, subscription-gated).

item.title: We're Bringing Learning to Rank to Elasticsearch
item.description: We’re Bringing Learning to Rank to Elasticsearch Source: opensourceconnections.com/blog/2017/02/14/elasticsearch-learning-to-rank/ Author: OpenSource Connections (announced by the team behind Relevant Search; Doug Turnbull) Published: 2017-02-14 The launch of the o19s/elasticsearch-learning-to-rank ...
